title: Struthiopteris gilliesii
intro: Struthiopteris gilliesii, also known as Struthiopteris, is a species of fern native to eastern Australia, characterized by its delicate, lacy fronds and rhizomatous growth habit. Traditionally used in Aboriginal medicine, Struthiopteris gilliesii has been found to possess various health benefits, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Struthiopteris gilliesii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Struthiopteris gilliesii is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, often used to treat coughs, colds, and skin irritations.
